name: Zhejiang Huangma Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Huangma Technology Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, researches, manufactures, and sells surfactants and related products in China. It primarily offers PCE with polymer polyether plates, C4 derivative functional intermediates, modified silicone new materials with high performance polyether plates, and textile auxiliaries with green new surfactant plates. The company provides its products for use in lubricant and metalworking, coating and ink, agrochemical adjuvant, PCE, water treatment, specialty fiber, personal care, and composite material applications, as well as in silicones surfactants and textile auxiliaries. Zhejiang Huangma Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
